@@ -1,51 +1,56 @@
 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current strategy after Week 13 actions (Day 91)
-- Day91 dashboard before actions: cash $3.251M; individual subs 115,665; active E3 seats 3,845/4 accounts; open issues ~9.9k. No outage/overload, tier5 peak day91 usage ~20.0M/25M. Active stored MRR ~$10.72M/mo (S2 $10.465M + E3 $256k). Post-action cash is $2.006M after tier6 R&D + market/group research.
-- Week12->13 at $85k/day S2 ads and A69/B139/C299 + $20 S2 lead promo: paid S2 leads 47,763 on $595k (0.080 leads/$; content 45,174 on $525k, search 761, social 1,828); paid conversions ~37,793 (~79%); S2 network leads ~4,441 with 3,499 subs (~79%). New individual subs 41,292; sub receipts $3.951M; weekly costs ads $595k + compute $431k + ops $224k + dev $189k + capacity $70k + lead $27k. Net pre-actions +$2.42M. Price lift worked; CAC still excellent (~$16 paid CAC incl lead cost vs first cash ~$82 and MRR ~$100).
-- Day91 actions now in force:
-  - Prices raised for NEW self-serve subs to A=$79/B=$159/C=$349; model tiers unchanged A2/B3/C4; quotas unchanged A=5,000/B=300,000/C=500,000. Recurring promo $0. Lead promo: S2 $30 (so first cash A=$49, B=$129, C=$319), D_S07 $30, others $0. Ads strength 0.
-  - Ads held: S2 content_marketing $75k/day + search_ads $5k/day + social_media $5k/day = $85k/day total. Do not forget `set_targeted_ad_spend` is full replacement.
-  - Spend: global ops $5k/day + targeted ops S2 $35k, E3 $10k, S1 $1k, S3 $0.5k = total ops $51.5k/day. Global dev $4k/day + targeted dev S2 $15k, E3 $8k, D_S07 $5k = total dev $32k/day. Capacity upgraded to tier6 ($28k/day, 80M units). Fixed non-compute burn now ~$196.5k/day plus lead costs/compute.
-  - Social post Day91 acknowledged quota/support pain, promised more S2/E3 support staffing, stale-ticket escalation, and in-app quota visibility.
-- R&D: t1 completed Day86 boost +0.0289. In progress: t2 completes Day93 +0.0619; t3 Day100 +0.1023; t4 Day107 +0.1078; t5 Day114 +0.0840; t6_1 started Day91 cost $1.0M, completes Day140, excellent roll +0.5559. Consider t7 ($1.167M) Day98 only if cash after week >~$3.8M and S2 unit economics/capacity remain strong; otherwise wait for liquidity.
+## Current strategy after Week 14 actions (Day 98)
+- Day98 pre-action dashboard: cash $2.661M; individual subs 133,014; enterprise subscribed seats 5,367 dashboard / 5,339 in active-sub query; open issues ~10.7k. No outage/overload; tier6 peak usage last week ~24.7M/80M. Active stored MRR ~$12.94M/mo: S2 $12.609M + E3 $331.8k.
+- Week13->14 results: cash +$655k despite $1.0M R&D paid prior week. Sub payments $2.601M; costs ads $595k + compute $558k + ops $360.5k + dev $224k + capacity $196k + lead $12k. New individual subs 18,942; cancellations 1,593. S2 paid leads 19,304 on $595k (paid conv ~87%); content 18,191/$525k, social 816/$35k, search only 297/$35k. Final-day lpd had saturated (content/social ~$0.024 leads/$; search poor), so search was cut.
+- Day98 actions now in force:
+  - Prices unchanged A=$79/B=$159/C=$349; model tiers A2/B3/C4. Quotas raised to A=15,000/B=500,000/C=1,000,000 for burst-headroom messaging (observed S2 users still far below quotas).
+  - Recurring promo: D_S07 only $20; all others $0. Lead promo: S2 lowered from $30 to $20 (first cash A=$59/B=$139/C=$329); D_S07 $40 (with recurring promo, first A likely ~$19 and recurring A=$59); all others $0. Watch S2 conversion after this promo cut.
+  - Ads strength 0. Targeted ads (FULL REPLACEMENT): S2 content_marketing $75k/day + social_media $5k/day = $80k/day; search_ads now $0. No D_S07 ads yet until network conversion proves out.
+  - Spend: global ops $5k/day + targeted ops S2 $48k, E3 $16k, S1 $2k, S3 $0.5k = total ops $71.5k/day. Global dev $4k/day + targeted dev S2 $10k, E3 $8k, D_S07 $15k, D_E02 $5k = total dev $42k/day. Tier6 capacity held ($28k/day, 80M units). Fixed non-compute burn now ~$221.5k/day + compute + lead costs.
+  - Social post Day98 was concrete SLA/quota update: P1 human ack <4h, daily status, stale-ticket auto-escalation, queue+resume for batch jobs, weekly ticket-age metrics.
+- Expected next-week economics after actions: known renewal schedule days99-105 ~$1.66M before churn; new S2 first payments likely ~$0.8M-$1.3M depending saturation/conversion; fixed weekly burn ~$1.55M plus compute ~$0.6M. Enterprise acceptances are the largest uncertainty.
 
 ## Enterprise
 - ALWAYS manually query latest open enterprise turns before advancing; reply to every latest non-agent open thread (including `system` new leads). Use true seats via MAX(seat_count); agent rows often show seat_count=1.
-- Day91 before actions had 128 latest non-agent open threads: 123 new system E3 leads / 133,874 seats + 5 low-B counters. Replied to all; latest_non_agent_count verified 0.
-- New recession-aware E3 standard offer is B$29/C$49 (month-to-month). Reason: macro PMI 46.1 and counters were low; B29 is near estimated compute breakeven under E3 usage estimate but likely profitable on actual observed usage. #8685 counter B$33.38 accepted (sent B33.38/C49). Low counters #54892 B12.20, #20373 B3.90, #20375 B19.29, #15998 B8.42 were countered with B29/C49.
-- Open E3 pipeline after actions: 279 leads / ~317.6k seats (latest all agent). Classes include 131 B29/C49 leads / 144.9k seats, 66 B39/C49 / 77.8k, 40 old B49/C69 / 44.7k, 38 B45/C59 / 45.9k, plus small leftovers. No new seats accepted during week13, but E3 avg response is slow (~24 days); monitor for acceptances/counters.
-- Active E3: #4991 338 seats C42.02, #5282 1,152 seats C69, #5955 537 seats C69, #14459 1,818 seats C69. All still have latest churn-prevention/retention offers from us (latest agent). Retain where feasible; B >=~29 or C >=~42 is usually acceptable.
-
-## New market discoveries
-- Day91 market research: discovered D_E02 Educational Institutions, D_S07 Data Analysts, D_S10 Music Producers; 16 hidden segments remain.
-- D_S07 (lvl1 noisy): WTP ~$94.5, usage ~180/day, q_min ~0.349, cap ~54k, growth 17.8%; strong network/reputation links with S2/S3. Added D_S07 $30 lead promo and $5k/day targeted dev. Level2 research started, due Day94. Do not buy D_S07 ads until level2 results and organic/network conversion are checked, but it is the best next self-serve expansion candidate as S2 saturates.
-- D_E02 (lvl1 noisy): Educational Institutions, WTP ~$81.8, q_min ~0.304, cap ~183 enterprise accounts, seats 52-735, avg response 7.4d. Level2 research due Day94. Potential enterprise pipeline candidate after info improves.
-- D_S10 (lvl1): WTP ~$99.5 but q_min ~0.63 and high lock-in aversion; likely needs more quality/dev before advertising. Wait.
-- D_E09 Real Estate remains a dud: previous $21k ad test generated zero leads; no spend.
+- Day98 had 169 latest non-agent open threads (164 system new E3 leads + 4 low new-lead counters + #5282 churn-prevention counter), 183,412 seats. Replied to all; latest_non_agent_count verified 0.
+- Standard E3 offer remains recession-aware B$29/C$49, month-to-month. Reason: PMI 46.1 contraction and many counters are low; B29 is the current floor for new/countering leads. Do NOT accept new-lead counters below B29 unless later evidence shows actual usage is safely low and cash upside justifies it.
+- Exception sent Day98: active E3 #5282 (1,152/1,161 seats, current C$69, recent usage near zero) countered churn-prevention B$17.74; replied with B$17.74/C$49 to preserve logo and avoid losing a still-profitable account. Monitor whether it accepts before/around renewal.
+- Active E3 after Day98: #5282 1,152 seats C69 (churn thread latest agent B17.74/C49), #5955 537 C69, #14459 1,818 C69, #19085 1,832 B49 (accepted Day95 from old B49 offer). Last-14d usage is lumpy: #19085 avg 100k account units/day for first 3 days; #5282 avg 14k/day, #14459 50k/day, #5955 ~471/day.
+- Open E3 new-lead pipeline after actions: 443 leads / 494k seats (latest all agent). Classes: B29/C49 297 leads / 323.9k seats; B39/C49 65 / 77.0k; C59/B45 38 / 45.9k; old C69/B49 39 / 43.1k; B30ish 3 / 2.9k; C49/B45 1 / 1.35k. Response times are slow (E3 avg ~24d); expect lumpy acceptances/counters.
 
 ## Segment/unit-economics notes
-- S2 remains the cash engine. Active S2 115,654 vs noisy cap estimate ~167k; saturation will matter soon. Delivered S2 Day91 before future R&D: A 1.280, B 1.536, C 1.707 with group bonus +1.275, so big quality cushion supports higher new list prices.
-- Current S2 usage: A/B average ~162-166 units/day, max <850 despite A quota 5,000; no one is actually near quotas. Quota social complaints likely lag from old experience/support, not observed cap hits. Keep watching issue age and sentiment.
-- Search ads are lower efficiency (~0.022 leads/$) but still profitable; content remains best (~0.086 leads/$ weekly, variable from 0.048-0.120 daily). Keep $85k/day while paid lpd >~0.05 and conversion >~60%; trim to $55k-$65k if cap saturation collapses leads or issues worsen.
-- Day91 price/promo test: A79/B159 with $30 S2 lead promo keeps A first price unchanged ($49) and raises B first cash only +$10 (to $129), while recurring list increases materially. Watch new S2 conversion, plan mix, and 30-day renewal risk.
+- S2 remains main cash engine but is approaching noisy cap: active S2 133,004 vs lvl1 cap estimate ~167k, and paid lpd fell sharply late week. Current S2 stored MRR $12.61M/mo (A 72,767 / $4.692M; B 60,124 / $7.888M; C 113 / $28.7k). Delivered S2 Day98: A 1.5015, B 1.8019, C 2.0021 with group bonus +1.4929, so quality cushion is huge.
+- S2 price/promo Day91 worked: conversion ~87% at A79/B159 with $30 lead promo and B share ~40-48%. Day98 S2 lead promo cut to $20 for more cash. If paid conversion stays >75% and content/social CAC <= first cash (~$95 blended), hold. If conversion collapses or CAC > first cash for multiple days, restore S2 lead promo to $30 and/or trim ads.
+- S2 search ads are currently bad (297 leads on $35k, ~$137 paid CAC before lead cost); keep search off unless data changes. Content remains best; social is variable but okay. If combined content/social lpd stays <0.015 or issues worsen, trim S2 ads to $50k-$60k/day.
+- Usage/capacity: S2 A/B avg usage ~100-200 units/day; no users near quotas despite quota social complaints. Day98 peak total usage 22.7M, capacity 80M; tier6 safe. Upgrade to tier7 only if peak >65M/80M or several large E3 acceptances create a clear >65M forecast.
+- Support/social: open S2 issues ~10.9k but avg open age only ~0.28d; social still complains about stale support and quota/batch failures. Ops raised materially. Watch avg age, old tickets >=7d, E3 posts, and cancellations.
 
-## Day 98 priorities
+## New/discovered groups
+- D_S07 Data Analysts lvl2: WTP ~$108, usage ~207/day, q_min ~0.422, cap ~71k, growth 17.1%; strong network/reputation links to S2/S3. Week92-98 got 798 network leads and 0 conversions under old no-recurring-promo/$30-lead-promo + only $5k dev, so price/quality hurdle was not cleared. Day98 actions: recurring promo $20, lead promo $40, targeted dev raised to $15k/day. Do NOT buy ads until Day105 network conversion is checked; if conversion >30% and cash healthy, test small ads ($5k-$10k/day content/social) while preserving S2 core.
+- D_E02 Educational Institutions lvl2: WTP ~$69.6, usage ~93/day, q_min ~0.481, cap ~301 enterprise accounts, seats 63-760, avg response 9.2d. Day98 delivered C 0.509 and B 0.458 before t3; targeted dev $5k/day added. After t3 Day100, B should clear q_min. Consider small linkedin/content enterprise test only after cash >$4M and quality confirmed; likely offers B29/C49.
+- D_S10 Music Producers lvl1 has q_min ~0.63 and high lock-in aversion; wait for more quality. D_E09 Real Estate remains a dud (prior $21k ad test zero leads); no spend.
+
+## R&D / research
+- Completed: t1 Day86 +0.0289; t2 Day93 +0.0619. In progress: t3 Day100 +0.1023; t4 Day107 +0.1078; t5 Day114 +0.0840; t6 Day140

future_rd=[(112,1166667,'t7'),(126,1333333,'t8'),(140,1500000,'t9'),(154,1666667,'t10'),(168,2500000,'t11'),(189,3666667,'t12'),(210,5000000,'t13'),(238,6666667,'t14')]

def pct(vals,p):
    vals=sorted(vals); return vals[int((len(vals)-1)*p)]

def choose_offer(e):
    d={p:pr for p,pr in e['offers']}
    # For B29/C49, many budget-constrained accounts choose B; some choose C for quality.
    if 'B' in d and 'C' in d:
        pc=0.45 if d['B']<=31 else (0.55 if d['C']<=49 else 0.50)
        return ('C',d['C']) if random.random()<pc else ('B',d['B'])
    if 'B' in d: return 'B',d['B']
    if 'C' in d: return 'C',d['C']
    return 'B',29.0

def initial_ent_events(days):
    ev=[]
    for e in open_ents:
        age=DAY-e['first_day']
        p=max(0.01,min(0.70,random.gauss(e['mu'],0.10)))
        # very old, unreplied old-price leads are less likely to ever close; fresh B29s are slow.
        if e['kind']=='C69B49_old' and age>35: p*=0.55
        if random.random()<p:
            if age>35: delay=max(1,int(random.gauss(7,6)))
            elif age>20: delay=max(2,int(random.gauss(13,8)))
            elif age>7: delay=max(5,int(random.gauss(20,10)))
            else: delay=max(8,int(random.gauss(30,13)))
            day=DAY+delay
            if day<=DAY+days:
                plan,price=choose_offer(e)
                ev.append({'day':day,'seats':e['seats'],'plan':plan,'price':price,'mod':day%30})
    return ev

def simulate(days,seed):
    random.seed(seed)
    cash=cash0
    cohorts=[c.copy() for c in small]
    ents=[e.copy() for e in ent]
    ent_events=initial_ent_events(days)
    active0=sum(c['n'] for c in cohorts if c['group']=='S2')
    # noisy S2 market cap and growth; current info level is low/noisy
    market_cap=max(145000,random.gauss(174000,26000))
    cap_growth=max(0.00015,random.gauss(0.00038,0.00010))
    paid_lpd=max(0.010,min(0.055,random.lognormvariate(math.log(0.024),0.38)))  # leads/$ for content+social at current saturation
    net_rate=max(0.0009,min(0.0040,random.gauss(0.0020,0.00055)))              # S2 network leads per active sub/day before saturation
    conv_base=max(0.70,min(0.92,random.gauss(0.835,0.055)))                   # after S2 first-month promo lowered to $20
    mixA=max(0.45,min(0.66,random.gauss(0.54,0.045)))
    mixB=max(0.32,min(0.52,random.gauss(0.45,0.045)))
    if mixA+mixB>0.985: mixB=0.985-mixA
    monthly_ret=max(0.925,min(0.985,random.gauss(0.958,0.018)))
    rd_done=set()
    # active churn-prevention risk: one E3 C account likely discounts to B17.74 or churns; approximate over first week
    for d in range(DAY+1,DAY+days+1):
        rel=d-DAY
        active_s2=sum(c['n'] for c in cohorts if c['group']=='S2')
        cap=market_cap*((1+cap_growth)**rel)
        # relative saturation collapses lead flow as we approach cap, but cap is uncertain.
        denom=max(0.05,1-active0/market_cap)
        rel_sat=max(0.02,min(1.20,(1-active_s2/cap)/denom))
        # likely future ad policy: hold 80k while CAC is near payback; trim as cap saturation worsens.
        ad=80000.0
        if active_s2>0.88*cap: ad=55000.0
        if active_s2>0.95*cap: ad=25000.0
        paid=max(0,random.gauss(ad*paid_lpd*rel_sat, max(25,ad*paid_lpd*0.27)))
        net=max(0,random.gauss(active_s2*net_rate*rel_sat, max(15,active_s2*net_rate*0.30)))
        leads=paid+net
        cv=conv_base + min(0.035,rel*0.0015)
        for bd,b in boosts:
            if d>=bd: cv+=min(0.025,b*0.12)
        if random.random()<0.018: cv-=random.uniform(0.04,0.13)  # competitor/reputation shocks
        cv=max(0.55,min(0.94,random.gauss(cv,0.035)))
        new=leads*cv
        ma=max(0.43,min(0.70,random.gauss(mixA,0.035)))
        mb=max(0.25,min(0.54,random.gauss(mixB,0.030)))
        if ma+mb>0.99: mb=0.99-ma
        nA=new*ma; nB=new*mb; nC=max(0,new-nA-nB)
        # S2 first billing: list A79/B159/C349 less $20 lead promo.
        cash += nA*59 + nB*139 + nC*329
        cohorts.append({'n':nA,'seats':nA,'group':'S2','plan':'A','price':79.0,'mod':d%30,'age':0})
        cohorts.append({'n':nB,'seats':nB,'group':'S2','plan':'B','price':159.0,'mod':d%30,'age':0})
        if nC>0: cohorts.append({'n':nC,'seats':nC,'group':'S2','plan':'C','price':349.0,'mod':d%30,'age':0})
        # D_S07 free network leads: Day98 promo + targeted dev should gradually unlock conversion.
        dlead=max(0, random.gauss(active_s2*0.00075*rel_sat, max(8, active_s2*0.00075*0.35)))
        dcv=max(0.05,min(0.75,random.gauss(0.18 + min(0.42,rel*0.035),0.12)))
        dnew=dlead*dcv
        if dnew>0:
            # D_S07 recurring promo $20 and lead promo $40; first cash likely very low but recurring profitable.
            cash += dnew*19
            cohorts.append({'n':dnew,'seats':dnew,'group':'D_S07','plan':'A','price':59.0,'mod':d%30,'age':0})
        # new weekly E3 pipeline generated by network; responses mostly beyond near-term horizon
        lam=max(0,active_s2*0.00012*rel_sat)
        e3_new=max(0,int(random.gauss(lam,max(1,math.sqrt(max(1,lam))))))
        for _ in range(e3_new):
            seats=max(200,random.gauss(1120,470))
            p=max(0.10,min(0.42,random.gauss(0.27,0.08)))
            if random.random()<p:
                delay=max(8,int(random.gauss(30,13)))
                ev_day=d+delay
                if ev_day<=DAY+days:
                    plan='C' if random.random()<0.45 else 'B'; price=49.0 if plan=='C' else 29.0
                    ent_events.append({'day':ev_day,'seats':seats,'plan':plan,'price':price,'mod':ev_day%30})
        # Enterprise acceptances
        for ev in list(ent_events):
            if ev['day']==d:
                cash += ev['seats']*ev['price']
                ents.append({'group':'E3','seats':ev['seats'],'n':1,'plan':ev['plan'],'price':ev['price'],'mod':d%30,'age':0})
                ent_events.remove(ev)
        # Small renewals/churn
        for c in cohorts:
            if c['age']>0 and c['mod']==d%30 and c['n']>0:
                ret=monthly_ret
                if c['group']=='D_S07': ret=max(0.80,min(0.96,random.gauss(0.90,0.05)))
                elif c['group']!='S2': ret=max(0.75,min(0.96,random.gauss(0.88,0.05)))
                if active_s2>0.90*cap and c['group']=='S2': ret-=0.015
                for bd,b in boosts:
                    if d>=bd: ret+=min(0.015,b*0.06)
                ret=max(0.78,min(0.995,random.gauss(ret,0.015)))
                c['n']*=ret; c['seats']=c['n']
                cash += c['n']*c['price']
            c['age']+=1
        # Enterprise renewals/churn/discount risk
        for e in ents:
            if e['age']>0 and e['mod']==d%30 and e['seats']>0:
                eret=0.84 if e['price']<=49 else 0.74
                for bd,b in boosts:
                    if d>=bd: eret+=min(0.05,b*0.13)
                eret=max(0.50,min(0.98,random.gauss(eret,0.09)))
                if random.random()<eret:
                    # 5282-like retention discount chance for high-priced old C renewals
                    price=e['price']
                    if price>=69 and random.random()<0.18: price=random.choice([49.0,39.0,29.0,17.74]); e['price']=price; e['plan']='B' if price<49 else e['plan']
                    cash += e['seats']*e['price']
                else:
                    e['seats']=0
            e['age']+=1
        ents=[e for e in ents if e['seats']>0]
        # Costs: fixed spend, lead acquisition, compute, incidents.
        ops=5000+66500; dev=4000+38000; capcost=28000
        cash -= (ad+ops+dev+capcost)
        cash -= (leads+dlead)*0.5
        # Compute by plan (daily dollars per subscriber/seat), randomized from recent observed usage.
        for c in cohorts:
            if c['n']<=0: continue
            if c['plan']=='A': per=max(0.12,random.gauss(0.28,0.08))
            elif c['plan']=='B': per=max(0.35,random.gauss(0.90,0.22))
            else: per=max(0.7,random.gauss(1.9,0.55))
            # D_S07 usage similar to S2 but slightly higher
            if c['group']=='D_S07': per*=1.20
            cash -= c['n']*per
        for e in ents:
            usage=max(5,random.gauss(45,35))  # usage units per seat/day; active accounts have been lumpy but usually below noisy estimate
            cost_per=0.006 if e['plan']=='B' else 0.012
            cash -= e['seats']*usage*cost_per
        if random.random()<0.010:
            cash -= random.uniform(50000,350000)
        # Future R&D investment if liquidity permits (forecasts include our likely future policy, not pure run-rate cash harvesting).
        for rd_day,cost,name in future_rd:
            if d==rd_day and name not in rd_done and cash>cost+2600000:
                cash-=cost; rd_done.add(name)
    return cash, sum(c['n'] for c in cohorts if c['group']=='S2'), sum(c['n']*c['price'] for c in cohorts), sum(e['seats'] for e in ents)

for days in [7,28,84,182]:
    N=650 if days<=84 else 450
    vals=[]; subs=[]; mrr=[]; seats=[]
    for i in range(N):
        v,s,m,e=simulate(days, days*100000+i)
        vals.append(v); subs.append(s); mrr.append(m); seats.append(e)
    print(days, 'mean',round(statistics.mean(vals)), 'median',round(statistics.median(vals)), 'p025',round(pct(vals,0.025)), 'p10',round(pct(vals,0.10)), 'p90',round(pct(vals,0.90)), 'p975',round(pct(vals,0.975)), 'subs_med',round(statistics.median(subs)), 'mrr_med',round(statistics.median(mrr)), 'ent_seats_med',round(statistics.median(seats)))

        r = fn()

        return r

  GROUP BY customer_id
), mx AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) AS seats, MIN(day) AS first_day, COUNT(*) AS msgs

)
SELECT t.customer_id, c.group_id, t.sender, t.thread_type, t.turn_number, t.day,
